query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (quizId, questionText, questionTextSwahili, questionType, `order`, points) VALUES 
(17, 'What does prevenient grace mean?', 'Prevenient grace inamaanisha nini?', 'multiple_choice', 1, 10),
(17, 'What is sanctification?', 'Utakatifu ni nini?', 'multiple_choice', 2, 10),
(17, 'According to Wesley, what does social holiness mean?', 'Kulingana na Wesley, utakatifu wa kijamii unamaanisha nini?', 'multiple_choice', 3, 10),
(17, 'What are Wesley''s three rules for using money?', 'Sheria tatu za Wesley za kutumia pesa ni zipi?', 'multiple_choice', 4, 10),
(17, 'Why did Wesley believe in small groups?', 'Kwa nini Wesley aliamini katika vikundi vidogo?', 'multiple_choice', 5, 10),
(17, 'What is the main idea of practical holiness?', 'Wazo kuu la utakatifu wa vitendo ni lipi?', 'multiple_choice', 6, 10)
